test.name: CT-01 - Cadastro sem aceitar os termos

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:5176/'.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Maria Teste' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome..']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '123.456.789-00' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu CPF..']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'maria@email.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu e-mail..']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Crie uma senha forte']'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite a senha novamente']'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),'Registrar')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 3 seconds.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.msg: Current location is 'http://localhost:5176/'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:5176/'.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Maria Teste' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome..']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '123.456.789-00' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu CPF..']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'maria@email.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu e-mail..']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Crie uma senha forte']'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite a senha novamente']'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.msg: Selecting checkbox 'xpath=//input[@type='checkbox']'.
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),'Registrar')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 3 seconds.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
